description: Abstract parent for the part-lineage entities. Each is its OWN entity with own provenance, timestamp, source and confidence — NOT a property on an Order. Models the Multi-Truth part counts of an order (produced/scrap/loss/ghost + booking claims) so divergence is first-class instead of being collapsed into one order field. Minted by the discrepancy-engine reconcile path and emitted onto the KG snapshot (services/discrepancy-engine/src/snapshot.ts partObject:68-92); the concrete label rides in as entity_type (types.ts ProductionPart:325-355). Never edge-sourced — therefore no delivery/scope/promotion wire-contract.

attributes.name: part_event_id
attributes.description: Unique part-event id (deterministic hash of order|label|source — ids.ts partEventId)

attributes.name: quantity
attributes.description: Number of parts in this event

attributes.name: source
attributes.description: Originating source (sap | plc_counter | bde | worker_note | inferred)

attributes.name: provenance
attributes.description: Structured provenance (raw refs, extractor, evidence) — JSON-serialised by the snapshot builder

relationships.description: Order this part-event belongs to (snapshot.ts partObject:69; to_element_id = part.for_order_no)
Machine that produced it (snapshot.ts partObject:70; optional)
